title: Project Alpha - Kick-off Meeting
content:
Meeting Date: Jan 15, 2026
Attendees: Sarah Chen, Mike Rodriguez, Lisa Park, Tom Wilson

Discussion Points:
- Project timeline: Q3 2026 target
- Budget approved: $500,000
- Team assignments: Sarah (Engineering), Mike (Design), Lisa (Product)

Key Decisions:
1. Use React for frontend
2. Adopt microservices architecture
3. Bi-weekly sprint reviews

Action Items:
- Sarah: Finalize project charter by Friday
- Mike: Create initial design system
- Lisa: Schedule stakeholder review

title: Project Alpha - Design Review
content:
Meeting Date: Jan 22, 2026
Attendees: Mike Rodriguez, Lisa Park, Emma Davis

Design Review Notes:
- New UI mockups presented
- Product team approved with minor changes
- Accessibility review still pending
- Mobile responsiveness needs improvement

Feedback Summary:
1. Navigation flow: Approved
2. Color scheme: Needs contrast adjustment
3. Form layouts: Approved
4. Dashboard widgets: Needs redesign

Action Items:
- Mike: Update mockups with feedback
- Emma: Schedule accessibility review
- Lisa: Prepare user testing plan

title: Sprint Retrospective - Sprint 4
content:
Sprint 4 Retrospective
Date: Jan 29, 2026
Team: Engineering

What went well:
- Velocity improved 15% over last sprint
- Zero production incidents
- Good collaboration between frontend and backend

What needs improvement:
- Testing bottleneck at integration stage
- Code review turnaround time (avg 2 days)
- Documentation gaps in API layer

Action Items:
- Add 2 QA engineers to integration team
- Implement parallel testing pipeline
- Set 24-hour code review SLA
- Update API documentation
